name: Dolphin 2.5 Mixtral 8x7B
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (8 experts, top-2 routing; Mixtral 8x7B base)
note: QLoRA fine-tune of Mixtral 8x7B (Apache-2.0) with refusals filtered out and Dolphin-Coder/MagiCoder data added; a benchmark of the late-2023 'uncensored' MoE fine-tune wave.
tpsNote: Q4 (~26GB) slightly exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; typically run with partial CPU offload or reduced context.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: HF repo dphn/dolphin-2.5-mixtral-8x7b exists, fine-tune of Mixtral-8x7B by Eric Hartford / Cognitive Computations, Apache-2.0, base 32K context fine-tuned at 16K, trained with Dolphin-Coder/MagiCoder data and refusals filtered (confirmed on model card and erichartford.com blog). releaseDate corrected/confirmed precisely via HF API createdAt field = 2023-12-14T00:45:47Z, matching the record exactly (training itself ran Dec 9-11, 2023, blog post published Dec 22, 2023). No results rows were present to verify. No changes needed.
